---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point are you experiencing?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case
How would you use this feature in your project?

## Package
Which package should this be added to?
- [ ] dev_buddy (overlay)
- [ ] dev_buddy_engine
- [ ] dev_buddy_dio / dev_buddy_http
- [ ] dev_buddy_riverpod / dev_buddy_bloc
- [ ] dev_buddy_mcp
- [ ] dev_buddy_devtools
- [ ] New package

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
